title: Verdict Scorecard
description: Canonical shape of a Verdict scorecard JSON document as emitted by skills/judge/scripts/score.py::save_score. See DEEP_ANALYSIS.md §Schema stability contract for evolution rules.

schemaVersion.description: SemVer. Major = 1 for the lifetime of this schema. Minor bumps are additive-compatible; patch bumps are purely editorial.

skill.description: Name of the evaluated skill or subagent (e.g. 'code-review').

composite_score.description: Final 0–10 composite after red-flag deductions and bonuses.

raw_composite.description: Weighted-sum composite BEFORE adjustments. Optional; not emitted by older runs.

red_flags.description: Auto-deduction triggers (hallucination, contradiction, ignored constraint, placeholder, rm -rf /).

bonuses.description: Auto-bonus triggers (edge cases, trade-off reasoning, structured output).

model.description: Model ID auto-detected from the transcript (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7'), or null when none was detected.

tokenizer_baseline.description: Multiplier applied to efficiency length thresholds for this model.

weights_source.description: Whether the weights came from the global config or a per-rubric <rubric>.weights.json sidecar.

verifier_collapse.description: Top-level mirror of dimensions.consistency.verifier_collapse. Present only when the verifier-collapse detector ran (judge-config.json.verifier_collapse.enabled=true). True = the rolling window of recent scorecards for this skill showed flatline-at-top behaviour; see the consistency dim entry for reason and stats.

llm_score.description: Optional LLM second-opinion score. Present only when llm_second_opinion.enabled=true in judge-config.json. Forward-compatible addition planned for v1.2.0.

llm_justification.description: Justification produced by the LLM second-opinion analyzer. Present alongside llm_score.

verifier_collapse.description: Present on the consistency dim entry when the verifier-collapse detector ran. True = the rolling window of recent scorecards for this skill showed flatline-at-top behaviour, distinct from low-variance consistency.

verifier_collapse_reason.description: One-line human-readable explanation of why verifier_collapse=true. Empty/absent when not flagged.

verifier_collapse_stats.description: Numeric context for the verifier-collapse signal: rolling window size, top_bucket_fraction, observed std_dev, configured thresholds. Surfaced even on near-misses so explain output can show why a collapse was/wasn't flagged.
